'''Mule''' was a [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] of 5 [[Heavy Lifter/Legends|Heavy Lifters]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Battle on the Frontier]]. Heavy Lifters ''Mule'' retrieved [[Cargo container/Legends|Cargo containers]] holding useful parts for [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] new space station [[NL-1]] in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
